channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective
item.description: arXiv:2605.08368v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Debates about large language model post-training often treat supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as imitation and reinforcement learning (RL) as discovery. But this distinction is too coarse. What matters is whether a training procedure increases the probabi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> fine-tuning, large language model, model, arxiv, research | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: CoCoDA: Co-evolving Compositional DAG for Tool-Augmented Agents
item.description: arXiv:2605.08399v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tool-augmented language models can extend small language models with external executable skills, but scaling the tool library creates a coupled challenge: the library must evolve with the planner as new reusable subroutines emerge, while retrieval fro...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, augmented, retrieval, context, analysis | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, platform, large language model, paper, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> tool, context, model, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Reinforcement learning for inverse structural design and rapid laser cutting of kirigami prototypes
item.description: arXiv:2605.08098v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Kirigami is an increasingly useful fabrication method to produce shape-programmable metamaterial structures. However, inverse design remains difficult because deployment is nonlinear, and feasible cut layouts must satisfy discrete compatibility rules,...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, arxiv, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
